headline: Meta +10% on AI cloud compute push
detail: Meta monetizing excess AI compute capacity is a direct signal that AI infrastructure spend is real and growing. This lifts sentiment for the entire AI/cloud stack - chips, networking, software. SMH, SOXL, and CRWD all benefit from this mood shift.
rec: No immediate trade - but if SMH firms up and SOXL stabilizes above $200 stop, the Meta catalyst gives fundamental backing. Watch SMH for a bounce before adding anything leveraged.

headline: Warsh: Stop watching the Fed, watch the data
detail: A Fed official telling markets to stop front-running rate signals removes a key uncertainty that's been capping growth and tech multiples. Lower rate anxiety is structurally bullish for QQQ and your chip names. This supports holding your QQQ and SPY positions.
rec: No trade needed - this is a tailwind, not a trigger. Your QQQ and SPY holds are fine; let this play out.

headline: Palantir's Karp bashes OpenAI/Anthropic token model
detail: Karp is drawing a distinction between Palantir's enterprise AI approach and consumer/API token models. This is more noise than signal for your holdings, but it keeps AI narrative in focus which broadly helps CRWD and cloud-adjacent names.
rec: Nothing actionable for your specific book - CRWD is already working and doesn't need this as a catalyst to manage.

headline: Space and defense stocks called generational buy
detail: Analysts flagging defense as a top opportunity, backed by UK's $20B spending boost headline. This is not your sector - your book is 90% tech/chips - but if you have any curiosity about diversifying, this is the narrative building.
rec: Skip it. You're margin-concentrated in tech already and adding a new sector while managing three underwater positions would stretch your attention and capital in the wrong direction.
